objections.description: Raising the global chunk warning limit to 700 is a blunt instrument that masks potential bloat in unrelated chunks. This configuration change lacks justification via bundle analysis output.
objections.suggested_fix: Revert global warnLimit increase. Configure specific chunk size limits or suppress warnings programmatically only for the known pdf-export chunk.

objections.description: Artifact claims 'expandable branches' but does not specify if branch data is fetched on-expand or loaded upfront. Upfront loading of the entire graph will cause performance degradation on large documents.
objections.suggested_fix: Implement lazy-fetching for branch expansion using the existing getDocumentGraph() with depth/offset parameters.

objections.description: React.lazy + Suspense implementation lacks a defined fallback UI. Users will see blank screens during chunk loading instead of skeletons or spinners.
objections.suggested_fix: Wrap lazy components in Suspense with a consistent LoadingFallback component.

suggestions.description: Add bundle-analyzer plugin to verify pdf-export chunk isolation before merging config changes.
Generate graph types from backend OpenAPI schema to prevent type drift between frontend and backend.
